WorkoutDescription:
POST-RACE RECOVERY
No running. Walk 20-30min. Foam roll gently. Protein 1.8g/kg, carbs high. Sleep 9h+.

EASY WALK
Distance: 3km | D+: 0m | Duration: 30min

Flat easy walk, loosen the legs.
Full rest. 10min gentle stretching in the evening.

EASY SWIM
Distance: 0km | D+: 0m | Duration: 30min

Pull buoy ok. Pure circulation work, no sprints.

AM SESSION — WALK
Distance: 4km | D+: 50m | Duration: 45min
Easy walk, light hills ok.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
WARM-UP (2min): Cat-cow x10
MAIN BLOCK:
A1. 90/90 Hip Stretch — 60s each side
A2. Pigeon Pose — 60s each side
A3. Hip Flexor Stretch — 45s each side
A4. Hamstring Stretch — 45s each side
COOL-DOWN: Foam roll quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

EASY SPIN
Distance: 0km | D+: 0m | Duration: 1h

Flat, cadence 90+, HR <138. Café stop encouraged.
Rest. The work you bank in June = your race in September.
Full rest.

FIRST RUN BACK
Distance: 5km | D+: 30m | Duration: 30min

Flat, HR <138. Walk breaks if HR drifts. Report any post-race niggle.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN
Distance: 6km | D+: 50m | Duration: 40min
Flat, HR <138.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A — light reintro (45min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): Leg swings x15 | Glute bridges x15 | Bodyweight squats x15 | Ankle circles x15
MAIN BLOCK:
A1. Back Squat (eccentric) — 3x6 @ 50% — 4s descent, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8 each leg — Rest 60s
B1. Box Step-up (40cm) — 3x10 each leg — Rest 60s
B2. Romanian Deadlift — 3x8 — Rest 60s
C1. Eccentric Step-down (40cm) — 3x8 each leg — 4s lower — Rest 60s
C2. Calf Raise — 2x15 — Rest 30s
CORE CIRCUIT (x2): Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10 each side | Side Plank 30s each side
FINISHER — 8min EMOM: 10 KB Swings + 5 Box Jumps / 10 Push-ups + 10 Air Squats

EASY RUN + STRIDES
Distance: 7km | D+: 60m | Duration: 45min

Easy 40min, then 5x20s relaxed strides (not sprints), walk-back recovery.
Full rest. Book Nice accommodation + transport now (race Sept 26).

ROLLING LONG RUN
Distance: 11km | D+: 300m | Duration: 1h15

Rolling trail, mostly Z1-Z2. Relaxed.

HIKE WITH POLES
Distance: 6km | D+: 500m | Duration: 1h30

Easy hike, re-groove pole rhythm without running load.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 7km | D+: 50m | Duration: 45min
Flat, HR <138. Last month for fasted runs — enjoy them.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): Leg swings x15 | Glute bridges x15 | Bodyweight squats x15 | Ankle circles x15
MAIN BLOCK:
A1. Back Squat (eccentric) — 4x6 @ 60% — 4s descent, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8 each leg — Rest 60s
B1. Box Step-up (40cm) — 3x10 each leg — Rest 60s
B2. Romanian Deadlift — 3x8 — Rest 60s
C1. Eccentric Step-down (40cm) — 3x8 each leg — 4s lower — Rest 60s
C2. Calf Raise — 2x15 — Rest 30s
CORE CIRCUIT (x2): Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10 each side | Side Plank 30s each side
FINISHER — 8min EMOM: 10 KB Swings + 5 Box Jumps / 10 Push-ups + 10 Air Squats

AM SESSION — HILL REPEATS
Distance: 9km | D+: 300m | Duration: 1h10
10min warm-up. 6x4min on 10-15% grade at Z3 (153-168), walk down with HR <140 before next rep. 10min cool-down. Short steps, upright, active arms.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
WARM-UP (2min): Cat-cow x10
MAIN BLOCK:
A1. 90/90 Hip Stretch — 60s each side
A2. Pigeon Pose — 60s each side
A3. Hip Flexor Stretch — 45s each side
A4. Hamstring Stretch — 45s each side
COOL-DOWN: Foam roll quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM SESSION — EASY RUN
Distance: 7km | D+: 50m | Duration: 45min
Flat, HR <138.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
WARM-UP (5min): Arm circles x20 | Band pull-aparts x15 | Push-ups x10
MAIN BLOCK:
A1. Lat Pulldown — 4x12 — Rest 30s
A2. Push-up — 4x12 — Rest 30s
A3. Shoulder Press — 4x12 — Rest 30s
A4. Row — 4x12 — Rest 60s
CORE CIRCUIT (x3): Russian Twist 20 | Box Step-up 20 | Mountain Climbers 30s
COOL-DOWN (5min): Lat stretch 45s each | Pec stretch 45s each | Child's pose 60s

SALÈVE CLIMB
Distance: 10km | D+: 800m | Duration: 2h15

Ascent ~1h30 with poles, 400-450 m/h, Z2. Descent 45min controlled, quick steps, no braking — descents ARE your descent practice now.
Full rest.

LONG RUN
Distance: 22km | D+: 800m | Duration: 2h30

SUB-16H: 16h = 5:53/effort-km = your Gypaète effort-pace held 40% longer. Limiter = quad durability at km 95 + time stopped, not your engine. This block over-weights descent armor (eccentric) + aid efficiency.

Z2 throughout. Gut training starts NOW: 90g carbs/h on every run >1h30.

AID-STATION DRILL: simulate 2-3 stops — refill flasks, eat, restock, UNDER 3min each, eat while walking out, never sit. At Gypaète you lost 39min stopped; sub-16h needs <20min. ~20 free minutes on race day.

RECOVERY JOG
Distance: 7km | D+: 50m | Duration: 45min

Easy 45min Z1, or rest if legs heavy.

C2. Calf Raise — 2x15 — Rest 30s

FINISHER — 8min EMOM: 10 KB Swings + 5 Box Jumps / 10 Push-ups + 10 Air Squats

Distance: 10km | D+: 350m | Duration: 1h15
10min warm-up. 7x4min Z3 on 10-15% grade, walk down HR <140 between. 10min cool-down.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)

SALÈVE DOUBLE PARTIAL
Distance: 12km | D+: 1000m | Duration: 2h45

Climb, descend halfway, re-climb (1,000m D+). Nice has 4 major cols — re-climbing on tired legs is the specific skill. Poles always.
Full rest.

BIG MOUNTAIN LONG RUN
Distance: 32km | D+: 1800m | Duration: 4h

Z2 cap, walk all climbs with poles, run everything runnable. Full race fueling 90g carbs/h, salt /45min, 500-700ml/h.
GYPAÈTE LESSON: descents CONTROLLED, cadence 85+ — your max HR at Gypaète was the km-20 descent, not a climb.

AID-STATION DRILL: simulate 2-3 stops — refill flasks, eat, restock, UNDER 3min each, eat while walking out, never sit. At Gypaète you lost 39min stopped; sub-16h needs <20min. ~20 free minutes on race day.

C2. Spanish Squat — 3x45s — Rest 45s

Z2 ceiling. Climbs 450 m/h poles, descents controlled-firm cadence 85+. Full race protocol: 90g carbs/h, salt /45min, 500-700ml/h, caffeine 100mg at h3.

PLAN REVISED: the Jul 11-12 week-end choc was missed — it is NOT lost, it moves to Aug 1-2. Block ahead: progressive build (W6-8: 24km → 32km → 28km bridge) → THE big weekend (W9, Aug 8-9: 42km + 16km back-to-back) → recover (W10, no mountain needed) → sharpen (W11) → 50K simulation (FRIDAY Aug 28, W12) → peak (W13) → taper. One peak weekend, fully fresh, beats two compromised ones.

HEAT (no trainer): take Wed easy runs at midday in the heat + 15min hot bath post-run 2-3x/week — same adaptation, different tools.

Details: 42km / 2500m D+ — peak long run + aid drill

BIG WEEKEND — DAY 1 (peak volume session)

Z2 ceiling. Climbs 450-500 m/h poles, descents controlled-firm cadence 85+. Full race protocol: 90g carbs/h, salt /45min, 500-700ml/h, caffeine 100mg at h3. Last hour: run every runnable gradient on tired legs.

Details: Full rest — absorb the big weekend

RACE SIMULATION — FRIDAY (moved from Saturday: away from the mountains this weekend)
Distance: 50km | D+: 3000m | Duration: 6h30

THE non-negotiable session, 4 weeks out. Start at race time (~5am) with headlamp. Full kit. Exact race nutrition: 90g carbs/h, C90 hourly, bar /2h, salt /45min, caffeine at h3 then /3h.
PACING: climbs 450-500 m/h Z2 poles | flats 6:30-7:00/km | descents controlled-firm cadence 85+. Walk all climbs, never exceed Z3. If avg HR >130 at halfway, slow down.

AID-STATION DRILL: simulate 2-3 stops — refill flasks, eat, restock, UNDER 3min each, eat while walking out, never sit. At Gypaète you lost 39min stopped; sub-16h needs <20min. ~20 free minutes on race day.
Full rest. Legs up, eat big, walk 20-30min if it helps the stiffness. No terrain needed — recover wherever you are.

Rest. Feet up. Final kit check, flasks filled, pacing card in vest.
Be patient to km 30 — bank NOTHING, the race starts at km 70.
Early dinner. Sleep by 20h30 (bus to Roubion is early).

Details: 109km / 5400m D+ — Nice Côte d'Azur by UTMB
WorkoutDescription:
RACE DAY — NICE 100K (26 SEPT)
Distance: 109km | D+: 5400m | Duration: 16-17h

GOAL A: 16h (≈5:53/effort-km = your Gypaète effort-pace) | GOAL B: 17h | GOAL C: finish strong, sub-18h30.
DECISION RULE at km 55: if avg HR <125 AND quads fresh on descents → green light for 16h, press the second half. If not → settle into 17h, finish strong. No ego.

PACING: climbs 450-500 m/h poles Z2 max | flats 6:30-7:00/km Z1-Z2 | descents CONTROLLED cadence 85+ (remember km 20 at Gypaète, HR 179 — never that early again).
First 30km (high Mercantour): deliberately slow Z1-Z2. Km 30-70: steady Z2, aid stations <3min, never sit, target <20min total stopped. Km 70-109: the race starts here — descents to the sea win the time.

NUTRITION (Gypaète-validated): 80-90g carbs/h | C90 hourly | bar /2h | salt /45min | 500-700ml/h, more in afternoon heat | caffeine 100mg at h3 then /3h.
HEAT: ice/water on neck at every aid station from km 60. NIGHT START: headlamp until ~7h30.
Walk all climbs. Never exceed Z3. The Promenade is waiting.

POST-RACE
No running 7-10 days. Walk, swim, eat, sleep.
Days 1-7: no running | Days 8-14: easy jogs | Week 3+: normal running.
You left nothing on the course. Savor it.
